name: Descent Waypoint
flavor_text: Adventurers mark the safest routes deeper into the Anomalous Subsurface Environment, though 'safe' is a relative term.
art_prompt: A vast underground corridor carved with inhuman precision—smooth stone walls meeting perfect right angles, impossibly high ceiling receding into shadow. Faint bioluminescent markings glow along the floor, forming a pathway deeper into the darkness. Ancient machinery hums within the walls. The scale feels wrong, oppressive, built for something far larger than human.. Stylized digital illustration, panoramic landscape, dramatic atmospheric perspective, concept-art establishing shot, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
design_notes: Nonbasic fixing land designed by Haiku
